documentation: Notion AI is a connected assistant integrated directly into the Notion workspace. It can write, brainstorm, edit, summarize, and query the user's entire database of connected notes and documents.
pricing: Add-on costs $8/user/month (billed annually) for existing Notion subscribers, or $10/user/month for monthly billing.
release_notes: Q&A feature launch allows users to ask open-ended questions and receive answers sourced exclusively from their team's wiki.
